content:
若命运曾施与怜悯，
玫瑰将开满花园，诗歌抚拭焰中的哭啼；
母亲轻哼着歌谣，幸福浸入孩童的梦香；
……
若一切如常，愿一切如常。

✨ 特别活动「如果一切如常」，将于10月6日 9:00 - 10月20日 9:00 开启。
✨ 为大家奉上活动奖励预览图：

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

If fate should ever bestow its mercy,
Roses will bloom throughout the garden, as poetry soothes the seared cries;
Mother gently croons a lullaby, while happiness sinking into the child's sweet dreams;
…
If life was as usual. May life be as usual.

✨ Special event "If Life Was As Usual" will be available from <t:1759712400:F> to <t:1760922000:F>
* October 6, 9:00 to October 20, 9:00 (UTC+8).
✨ Here's the preview of the event rewards:
thread_title: V2.3.3.0 特别活动「如果一切如常」，奖励一览！Special Event "If Life Was As Usual" Rewards Overview!
